message:
Refactor CI gate runner: remove Arc/Mutex, add panic recovery and completeness check

Replace Arc<Mutex<Vec>> with direct thread::JoinHandle collection for
simpler concurrency. Handle thread panics with fail_simple fallback
instead of propagating. Add HashSet-based completeness check to ensure
every gate produces a result. Includes CLI context, library, integration
test, and startup improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
